allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; repos=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{r['name']} | {r['visibility']} | {r['pushed_at'][:10] if r['pushed_at'] else 'nunca'}\\"\) for r in repos]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"User: {d['login']} | Orgs: verifique manualmente\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); env=d.get\('env',{}\); [print\(f'{k}={v[:15]}...'\) for k,v in env.items\(\) if 'github' in k.lower\(\) or 'gh_' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); env=d.get\('env',{}\); print\('Env vars no settings.json:'\); [print\(f' {k}={str\(v\)[:20]}...'\) for k,v in env.items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Login: {d.get\('login','erro'\)} | Nome: {d.get\('name','?'\)} | Org acesso: verifique\\"\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Login: {d.get\('login','?'\)} | Status: OK\\"\)")
